relationships: ber:Tom yella yesɛa ugur akken ad yeqbel tayri n Mary
ber:Sami yesɛa tasewlaft tamsadurt d tamaynut
ber:Sami yesɛa takamra tamsadurt d tamaynut
ber:Imir-a, Sami yesɛa tasewlaft d tamsadurt
ber:Sami ur yelli ara yesɛa agafud akken ad imahel
ber:Ɣas yesɛa sat n tmerwin n yiseggasen deg tudert-nnes, maca mazal-it ixeddem
ber:Karl yebded, ur yettimɣur ara asmi i yesɛa kumraw n yiseggasen
ber:Asensu-nni yesɛa yiwet n tegnewt, ad as-tinid aql-ik deg uxxam
ber:Karl yebded, ur yettimɣur ara asmi i yesɛa 40 n yiseggasen
ber:Karl yeḥbes, ur yettimɣur ara asmi i yesɛa kumraw n yiseggasen
ber:Ɣas yesɛa sebɛin n yiseggasen deg tudert-nnes, maca mazal-it ixeddem
ber:Yezmer ad yefk qrib akk ayen yesɛa i lmend n waya

ber:Qrib s kra n win ay ssneɣ yesɛa tasnasɣalt
ber:Cikkeɣ dakken Tom yesɛa lḥeqq deg wayen yerzan aya
